title: Is Elevate by Monday Down?
excerpt: I don’t see anyone talking. It’s just looping a clip.

posts.author: Adrian (Adrian F. Guzman)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t see anyone talking. It’s just looping a clip.

posts.author: MelissaH (Melissa Hallbauer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Did this to me too; I just refreshed the page and it turned out my login had expired.

Couldn’t get into any of the engineering track meetings, though, even the ones I signed up for.

posts.author: lalondesteve (Steve Lalonde)
posts.cookedHtml: the last two engineering track broadcasts have been down for me too. I tried the others and they work, so my login is still good.

posts.author: Hi-Im-Elliott (Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml: Will there be a replay of the broadcasts for Today’s lectures?
